translations.en: a finely adorned woman with a tight mouth and wide eyes.
translations.zh: 一位衣著精緻的女子，嘴唇緊抿，雙眼圓睜。

translations.en: "Hello again."
"Hello."
She bows formally.
She bows stiffly. "I'm sorry, good
translations.zh: 她僵硬地行禮。「抱歉，尊貴的

translations.en: madam
sir
, but my shop is closed for now."
"See me some other time, when I am available for business."
translations.zh: 「請擇日再來，屆時在下方可處理生意。」

translations.en: "Marissa. You may call me '@Miss Trihune."
translations.zh: 「瑪麗莎。汝可稱在下為『@翠紅小姐』。」

translations.en: "Yes, that is much better."
"Yes, I can work with silk. But 'tis out of fashion..."
translations.zh: 「是的，在下能裁製絲綢，然而如今已不流行了……」

translations.en: "Nobody wears silk clothes this season."
"Oh, he's a threadmaker who lives here in town."
translations.zh: 「哦，他是個住在鎮上的紡線匠。」

translations.en: "Silly little man, but a fine spinner."
translations.zh: 「小個子蠢人，但紡線技術不錯。」

translations.en: "I get all my thread straight from him. No other source would do."
translations.zh: 「在下所有的線都直接從他那裡進貨，別無他選。」

translations.en: "Yes, that silly Arbeth person can spin spidersilk into thread."
translations.zh: 「是的，那個蠢蠢的阿伯斯能將蜘蛛絲紡成線。」

translations.en: "Charlotte, from New Magincia, weaves thread into silk cloth."
translations.zh: 「新馬精西亞的夏綠蒂會將絲線織成絲布。」

translations.en: "Bring me a bolt of her finest silk cloth, and then I can sew you a silk bag."
translations.zh: 「帶一匹她最上等的絲布來，在下便能為汝縫製一個絲袋。」

translations.en: "Oh, I understand. A large silk bag."
"Well, 'tis hardly a challenge for one of my skills. But, since it is important, I'll do it."
translations.zh: 「以在下的技藝，這不算什麼挑戰，然既然事關重要，在下便做吧。」

translations.en: "But I'll need to see the plans."
"But I'll need a @bolt of silk to do it, of course."
translations.zh: 「但在下當然需要一@匹絲布才能製作。」

translations.en: "I create garments of the highest @fashion."
translations.zh: 「在下創作最高端@時尚的服飾。」

translations.en: "Clothes fit to see the King in."
"Yes, well, come see me again." She yawns widely.
translations.zh: 「好吧，再來找在下吧。」她大打一個哈欠。

translations.en: "Hmph! I am not a gossip, $G."
"'Tis not my place to speak of that..."
"But it will cost you 75 gold. Alright?"
"Come back when you have the gold, $Y."
She takes the silk cloth and begins to work, following the balloon plans.
translations.zh: 她取過絲布，依照氣球圖樣開始製作。

translations.en: She works in silence, intent on her sewing.
translations.zh: 她默默工作，專注地縫製著。

translations.en: After a while, she completes the silk bag.
translations.zh: 過了一會兒，她完成了絲袋。

translations.en: "There, 'tis done!" she cries, handing you the bag.
translations.zh: 「好了，完成了！」她叫道，將袋子遞給汝。

translations.en: "Very well," she sniffs, offended.
"Which of you?"
"Suit yourself," she sniffs, offended.
1. Tunic
2. Dress
3. Pants
"Which one?"
"It'll cost you #1 gold for that $0. Interested?"
"You look pretty full to me."
"Excellent!" After accepting $Y's gold, $N hands over the $0.
$N looks at $Y. "How rude! Don't ask for something you can't pay for!"
translations.zh: $N看向$Y，「太無禮了！別開口要汝付不起的東西！」

translations.en: "Suit yourself," she sniffs, offended.
"Sorry, none of you has anything of interest."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，汝們沒有在下感興趣的東西。」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
"Just as well. That cloth is rather shabby..."
"I don't see any cloth, other than what you're wearing!"
translations.zh: 「在下看不到任何布料，除了汝身上穿的那件！」

translations.en: $N turns to $Y and asks "Will you take 20 gold for that cloth?"
translations.zh: $N轉向$Y，問：「那塊布料20金，汝肯賣嗎？」

translations.en: "Done!" She hands $Y 20 gold pieces and takes the cloth.
translations.zh: 「成交！」她遞給$Y 20枚金幣，取走布料。

translations.en: "Just as well. That cloth is rather shabby..."
Smart tunic
Fine dress
Pair of pants

translator_notes: 102 Marissa: 鴉爪鎮裁縫師，自視甚高的時裝設計師。需要絲布製作絲袋（熱氣球任務）。阿伯斯的線是她的唯一來源。
